steps.title: Use the legitimacy clue
steps.content: The sentence says a monarch lacking certain characteristics would be forced to do something to the throne. Since legitimacy is about the right to rule, the blank should mean give up power.

steps.title: Choose the power verb
steps.content: A means give in return, B means add notes to, and D means make equal; none fits a ruler losing legitimate authority. A monarch lacking legitimacy would be forced to give up the throne. The answer is C.
